clusters.title: Elon Musk becomes world's first trillionaire as SpaceX soars in stock market debut
clusters.neutral_headline: Musk becomes first trillionaire as SpaceX debuts on Nasdaq
bullet_summary: Reported by BBC Top Stories, CBS News, Al Jazeera and others

items.title: Elon Musk becomes world's first trillionaire as SpaceX soars in stock market debut
items.standfirst: Musk's AI and reusable rocket company listed on the Nasdaq stock exchange with a value of $2.2tn.
items.content: Musk's AI and reusable rocket company listed on the Nasdaq stock exchange with a value of $2.2tn.

items.title: Former SpaceX welder becomes a millionaire after historic IPO
items.standfirst: Juan Hernandez, a former SpaceX employee, owns 6,500 company shares. On the first day of public trading, his wealth ballooned by $1,046,175.
items.content: Juan Hernandez, a former SpaceX employee, owns 6,500 company shares. On the first day of public trading, his wealth ballooned by $1,046,175.

items.title: Elon Musk becomes the world's first trillionaire with SpaceX's IPO
items.standfirst: The SpaceX CEO's fortune on paper now rivals the annual economic output of many countries, according to World Bank data.
items.content: The SpaceX CEO's fortune on paper now rivals the annual economic output of many countries, according to World Bank data.

items.title: Key details on the SpaceX IPO that made Elon Musk a trillionaire
items.standfirst: Elon Musk is now the world's first trillionaire after the SpaceX IPO on Friday. CBS News' Kelly O'Grady reports.
items.content: Elon Musk is now the world's first trillionaire after the SpaceX IPO on Friday. CBS News' Kelly O'Grady reports.

items.title: Musk becomes first trillionaire as SpaceX debuts on Nasdaq
items.standfirst: Musk becomes first trillionaire as SpaceX debuts on Nasdaq
items.content: Musk becomes first trillionaire as SpaceX debuts on Nasdaq

items.title: Elon Musk Is the World’s First Trillionaire
items.standfirst: SpaceX’s stock market debut has thrust the richest man in the universe into an unexplored frontier of wealth.
items.content: SpaceX’s stock market debut has thrust the richest man in the universe into an unexplored frontier of wealth.

items.title: SpaceX IPO debuts in US markets, Musk becomes world’s first trillionaire
items.standfirst: The landmark listing cemented Musk's status as the first trillionaire and propelled SpaceX into ranks of most valuable.
items.content: The landmark listing cemented Musk's status as the first trillionaire and propelled SpaceX into ranks of most valuable.

items.title: Space Stocks Tumble as Investors Race Toward Musk’s IPO
items.standfirst: SpaceX’s long-awaited initial public offering triggered a selloff Friday in the shares of other rocket, satellite and space-related companies.
items.content: SpaceX’s long-awaited initial public offering triggered a selloff Friday in the shares of other rocket, satellite and space-related companies.

items.title: SpaceX IPO makes history as largest ever. Stock gains 19% on first day
items.standfirst: The initial public offering from the rocket and AI company raised some $75 billion, making the company one of the biggest in the world — and likely making Elon Musk a trillionaire.
items.content: The initial public offering from the rocket and AI company raised some $75 billion, making the company one of the biggest in the world — and likely making Elon Musk a trillionaire.(Image credit: RONALDO SCHEMIDT)

items.title: Elon Musk becomes trillionaire as SpaceX soars in Wall Street debut
items.standfirst: AI and rockets group cracks list of world’s most valuable companies after historic IPO
items.content: AI and rockets group cracks list of world’s most valuable companies after historic IPO

items.title: What Stock Traders Can Expect From SpaceX’s Trading Debut
items.standfirst: Investors will soon have a sense of how SpaceX shares will perform after the largest initial public offering ever — but they may need to wait several hours to get in on the trading action.
items.content: Investors will soon have a sense of how SpaceX shares will perform after the largest initial public offering ever — but they may need to wait several hours to get in on the trading action.

items.title: UK Retail Investors Place $1 Billion of Orders in SpaceX IPO
items.standfirst: Retail investors in the UK bought about $364 million worth of SpaceX shares, a small slice of the world’s largest-ever initial public offering.
items.content: Retail investors in the UK bought about $364 million worth of SpaceX shares, a small slice of the world’s largest-ever initial public offering.

items.title: SpaceX Shares Close 19% Higher After Historic $75 Billion IPO
items.standfirst: SpaceX’s first day on the stock market transformed the startup into one of the world’s most-valuable public companies, handed buyers of the IPO a 19% return and turned its founder Elon Musk into the world’s first trillionaire.
items.content: SpaceX’s first day on the stock market transformed the startup into one of the world’s most-valuable public companies, handed buyers of the IPO a 19% return and turned its founder Elon Musk into the world’s first trillionaire.

clusters.title: At least 1 killed, 9 hospitalized in Texas mass shooting; suspect dead
clusters.neutral_headline: Texas shooting leaves one person dead and nine others in hospital
bullet_summary: The suspect, Victor Mata Villarreal, was wanted for attempted murder of a police officer after shooting at law enforcement during a vehicle chase earlier this week, officials said
The possible suspect was in a standoff with officers for about two hours but later on Friday afternoon was reported deceased, police and the city’s mayor said
Authorities in Midland, Texas, say that suspected attacker confirmed dead after shooting and standoff with police

items.title: Texas shooting leaves one person dead and nine others in hospital
items.standfirst: Midland police reported that suspected shooter was dead after two-hour standoffSign up for the Breaking News US newsletter emailA shooting on Friday in Midland, Texas, has killed one person and sent a further nine to the hospital with injuries, according to the city’s authorities.The possible suspect was in a standoff with officers for about two hours but later on Friday afternoon was reported deceased, police and the city’s mayor said. Continue reading...

items.title: Sam Bankman-Fried loses bid to appeal against fraud conviction in FTX case
items.standfirst: Decision to not overturn fallen crypto mogul’s 25-year prison sentence was handed down by three-judge panel Sam Bankman-Fried on Friday lost his bid to overturn his fraud conviction and 25-year prison sentence over the collapse of the FTX cryptocurrency exchange he founded.The decision was handed down by a three-judge panel of the New York-based second US circuit court of appeals. Continue reading...

clusters.title: Thai princess dies aged 47
clusters.neutral_headline: Thailand’s Princess Bajrakitiyabha dies aged 47 after years in a coma
bullet_summary: Reported by Sky News World, Guardian World, BBC World

items.title: Thai princess dies aged 47
items.standfirst: Thailand's Princess Bajrakitiyabha has died after nearly four years in a coma, aged 47.
items.content: Thailand's Princess Bajrakitiyabha has died after nearly four years in a coma, aged 47.

items.title: Thailand’s Princess Bajrakitiyabha dies aged 47 after years in a coma
items.standfirst: Princess Bajrakitiyabha Mahidol’s health had worsened since she was hospitalised in December 2022 with heart problems that left her gravely illThe eldest child of Thailand’s King Maha Vajiralongkorn has died aged 47, the palace has said, after nearly four years in a coma.Princess Bajrakitiyabha Mahidol, known in Thailand as Princess Bha, had been in hospital since December 2022 when she became gravely ill after having heart problems while out training her dogs. Continue reading...
items.content: Princess Bajrakitiyabha Mahidol’s health had worsened since she was hospitalised in December 2022 with heart problems that left her gravely illThe eldest child of Thailand’s King Maha Vajiralongkorn has died aged 47, the palace has said, after nearly four years in a coma.Princess Bajrakitiyabha Mahidol, known in Thailand as Princess Bha, had been in hospital since December 2022 when she became gravely ill after having heart problems while out training her dogs. Continue reading...

clusters.title: China arrests a U.S. scholar with a history of Myanmar activism, suspected of spying

Min Zin was suspected of “engaging in espionage activities that endanger China’s national security,” China’s ministry of foreign affairs spokesperson, Lin Jian, said on Friday

items.title: China arrests US academic at conference for ‘espionage activities’
items.standfirst: Arrest of Min Zin, who writes about Myanmar and Chinese foreign policy, comes just month after Trump visit to BeijingChina has arrested a US scholar who writes about Myanmar and Chinese foreign policy on suspicion of spying.Min Zin was suspected of “engaging in espionage activities that endanger China’s national security,” China’s ministry of foreign affairs spokesperson, Lin Jian, said on Friday. items.title: David Hockney, iconic British artist, dies at 88
items.standfirst: David Hockney, a treasured British artist whose paintings of shimmering pools and colorful iPad drawings became icons of contemporary art, died on Friday aged 88. France 24 takes a look back at the life and career of one of the giants of the art world.

clusters.title: Air India Crash Report Delayed as Investigation Continues
clusters.neutral_headline: Air India Crash Report Delayed as Investigation Continues
bullet_summary: Reported by Bloomberg Technology, Sky News World

items.title: Air India Crash Report Delayed as Investigation Continues
items.standfirst: The final report about why an Air India Ltd. jetliner crashed last year won’t be issued by Friday’s mandatory deadline, with a government agency saying the investigation into the country’s worst commercial airline disaster still isn’t finished.
items.content: The final report about why an Air India Ltd. jetliner crashed last year won’t be issued by Friday’s mandatory deadline, with a government agency saying the investigation into the country’s worst commercial airline disaster still isn’t finished.

items.title: Air India crash report delay expected over unfinished engine analysis, source says
items.standfirst: A final report into a deadly Air India Boeing 787 crash is expected to be delayed past the one-year anniversary on Friday, a source has told Reuters.
items.content: A final report into a deadly Air India Boeing 787 crash is expected to be delayed past the one-year anniversary on Friday, a source has told Reuters.
